welcome.title: LivePlay
welcome.subtitle: Audio cue playback for live events
welcome.modeSubtitle: Where should LivePlay run the audio engine?
welcome.localModeDescription: Run the audio engine on this computer.
welcome.remoteModeDescription: Connect to a LivePlay server on the network.
welcome.remoteAddressHint: Enter the IP address or hostname of the LivePlay server.
welcome.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the server
welcome.serverUnreachable: Server found on the network but its connection port is unreachable — check the firewall on the server machine (allow TCP 4480)
welcome.connectedLocal: Using local server on this computer
welcome.noServersFound: No servers found yet — make sure a server is running on this network.

settings.title: Project Settings
settings.previewDeviceHelp: Device used when previewing cues with the headphones button.
settings.ltcDeviceHelp: Device used to send LTC timecode (optional).
settings.outputTargetHelp: Sets the brickwall limiter level, meter zone colours, waveform colours, and auto-volume target for this project.
settings.meterModeHelp: Unit shown on all stereo meters.
settings.disableAutoVolumeAndTrim: Disable automatic volume and trim adjustments
settings.disableLimiterHelp: Turns off the brickwall limiter, allowing peaks above the output ceiling. Can be changed during playback.
settings.disableSilenceWarningHelp: Stops the silence warning banner from appearing in the header.
settings.transitionModeHelp: Transition applied to newly imported tracks. Each track can still be switched between cross-fade and start-next in its properties.
settings.autoCueNext: Automatically cue next item even without end behaviour
settings.autoCueNextHelp: Arms the next item as "Up Next" even when the playing item has no end behaviour, so you can step through the playlist with a single GO button. It does not start playback automatically.
settings.stopAllFadeHelp: How long all cues take to fade out when you press Stop All. Set to 0 for an instant stop.
settings.scrollToPlayingHelp: Automatically keep the currently-playing item centred in the list.

playlist.title: Playlist
playlist.importHint: Use the import buttons or drag files here

cart.title: Cart Player
cart.emptySlot: Click to import or drag item here
cart.clickToImport: Click to import or drag item here

properties.title: Properties
properties.peakWarning: This item's loudness is significantly above the target level for your selected output target. Use 'Auto-adjust volume' to normalise it, or change the Output Target.
properties.noSelection: Select an item to view properties
properties.deviceOverrideHelp: Override the project's default output for this cue. Leave on 'Use project default' to follow the project setting.
properties.ltcOutputTimecodeHelp: Send SMPTE Linear Timecode to the project's LTC device while this cue plays.
properties.ltcRequiresDevice: Select an LTC output device in Project Settings to enable timecode output.
properties.multiSelectWaveform: Multiple items selected — choose a single item to display its waveform.
properties.multiSelectOutPointDisabled: Disabled for multiple selection (out point depends on each item's duration).

playback.startNextCountdown: Time until the next track starts

actions.previewNoDevice: No preview device configured — click to open Project Settings

connectionLost.title: Connection lost
connectionLost.message: The connection to the LivePlay server at {url} has been lost.
connectionLost.reconnectHint: Reconnect tries the same server again.
connectionLost.restartHint: Restart relaunches just the client (the audio server keeps running).

audioImport.title: Import audio
audioImport.serverHint: Files already on the server. Double-click a folder to descend, or click Add next to a file.
audioImport.uploadDescription: Pick one or more files from this computer. They'll be uploaded into the server's media folder.

localServer.spawnHint: Spawn a new one or switch to Remote

serverSettings.title: LivePlay Server
serverSettings.localModeDesc: App starts its own audio engine. Best for solo operators.
serverSettings.remoteModeDesc: Connect to a LivePlay server running on another machine.
serverSettings.engineNotRunning: Engine not running — Apply to start it
serverSettings.externalHint: Targeting external server. Make sure the remote URL is reachable.

youtube.previewHint: Click the preview button on a search result to view the video before downloading

update.updatePrompt: A new version of LivePlay is available. Would you like to download and install it now?
update.manualUpdatePrompt: A new version of LivePlay is available. Click below to visit the download page.
update.installInfo: The update is ready to install. You can install it now or it will be installed when you close the application.

midi.conflictMessage: This MIDI control is already assigned to "{action}". Reassign it?

controls.title: Configure Controls
controls.conflictMessage: This MIDI control is already assigned to "{action}". Reassign it?
controls.volumeMultiplierHint: dB changed per MIDI step. Increase for wheels that move slowly.

selectProject.title: Select Project
selectProject.message: Multiple projects found in the archive. Please select which one to open:

repair.title: Corrupt Project Detected
repair.message: This project was found to have issues and has been automatically repaired. The following problems were detected:
repair.dataLossWarning: Warning: some data may have been lost during repair.

exportProject.chooseLocationMessage: Where should the project archive be saved? You can save it on the server, or download it to this computer.

importProject.chooseSourceMessage: Where is the project archive? You can pick one already on the server, or upload one from this computer.

importAudio.title: Import audio
importAudio.serverHint: Files already on the server. Double-click a folder to open it; click files to select (Shift or Ctrl/Cmd-click for multiple), then Import selected.
importAudio.uploadIntro: Pick one or more files from this computer. They will be uploaded into the server's media folder.
importAudio.desktopOnly: Native file picker is only available in the desktop app.

unsavedModal.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedModal.message: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before continuing?

quitModal.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes. If you quit now they will be lost. Save your project first, or close and discard them?
quitModal.serverMessage: The audio server is running locally on this computer. Closing it will stop all playback and disconnect any other connected clients. Leave it running to close only this client.

deleteSelection.title: Delete Items
deleteSelection.message: {count} items are selected. What would you like to delete?
